name: Thoratec Corporation
description: Thoratec Corporation was a United States-based medical device company that specialized in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of proprietary mechanical circulatory support systems. Their primary focus was providing innovative solutions for the treatment of heart-failure patients worldwide, including the widely recognized HeartMate left ventricular assist systems. The company offered a comprehensive portfolio of products designed to address a full range of clinical needs for both acute and chronic circulatory support. Thoratec Corporation was acquired by St. Jude Medical in 2015, integrating its advanced cardiac technologies into a broader healthcare portfolio.
